blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,185 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
